name: Free Bus Travel for Women
description: 35 lakh women using TSRTC buses daily for free

name: Rajiv Arogyasri Expansion
description: Health coverage expanded to Rs 10 lakh per family

name: Caste Census
description: Comprehensive caste survey completed across Telangana

name: Rs 500 Gas Cylinder Subsidy
description: LPG cylinders subsidized to Rs 500 from market price

name: Gruha Jyothi (Free Electricity)
description: 200 units free electricity per household per month
keyMetric: 42.25 lakh households enrolled; 2.50 lakh eligible still receiving bills

name: Crop Loan Waiver
description: Complete crop loan waiver up to Rs 2 lakh promised
keyMetric: 25 lakh of 50 lakh targeted farmers covered; Rs 20,617 crore disbursed

name: Indiramma Indlu (Housing)
description: Free house site + Rs 5 lakh construction assistance
keyMetric: 4.5 lakh sanctioned; first houses inaugurated Sept 3, 2025 — 21 months after taking office

name: Cheyutha (Pensions)
description: Rs 4,000/month pension for senior citizens, widows, disabled
keyMetric: Pension amounts increased but conflicting reports on reaching full Rs 4,000 across all categories

name: Mahalakshmi Rs 2,500/month Cash Transfer
description: Rs 2,500 monthly cash transfer to every woman head of household
keyMetric: Zero disbursements. No pilot programme. No registration portal. Estimated annual cost: ~Rs 50,000 crore

name: Rs 4,000 Unemployment Allowance
keyMetric: Zero implementation. Deputy CM publicly denied the promise was ever made — manifesto contradicts him

name: Old Pension Scheme Restoration
description: Restore the Old Pension Scheme for government employees
